Industries
# Stay a step ahead, act now
Start your journey to quantum reality today by fostering innovation within your organization, unlocking your true potential, and propelling your development to new heights.
[ ![Banking](https://www.pasqal.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/Banking-desktop.jpg) Government & Public Sector Evaluate complex models for resource management, climate tech, and public infrastructure, while preparing for post-quantum cryptographic (PQC) standards. ](https://www.pasqal.com/industries/government-public-sector/)
[ ![Aerospace](https://www.pasqal.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/Aerospace-desktop.jpg) Aerospace & Defense Augment classical solvers to address fluid dynamics, aerodynamic design, and mission planning optimization. ](https://www.pasqal.com/industries/aerospace-defense/)
[ ![Manufacturing & Materials Science](https://www.pasqal.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Materials-industrials-desktop.jpg) Manufacturing & Materials Science Target high-value materials design using analog simulators to model complex chemical processes, magnetic materials, and battery components. ](https://www.pasqal.com/industries/manufacturing-materials-science/)
[ ![Banking](https://www.pasqal.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/Banking-desktop.jpg) Banking & Finance Utilize hybrid quantum-classical algorithms to model complex financial scenarios, targeting portfolio optimization, early risk detection, and fraud analysis. ](https://www.pasqal.com/industries/banking-finance/)
[ ![Pharma & Healthcare](https://www.pasqal.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/Pharma-healthcare-desktop.jpg) Pharma & Healthcare Integrate quantum simulation into the drug discovery pipeline to refine molecular docking, target identification, and early-stage compound modeling. ](https://www.pasqal.com/industries/pharma-healthcare/)
[ ![Enery and Utilitie](https://www.pasqal.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Enery-utilitie-desktops.jpg) Energy & Utilities Target grid-scale optimization and renewable energy modeling to manage complex distribution networks and accelerate the energy transition. ](https://www.pasqal.com/industries/energy-utilities/)
[ ![Transports](https://www.pasqal.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Transports-desktop.jpg) Transportation & Mobility Leverage quantum optimization capabilities to model complex maritime, aviation, and terrestrial routing, addressing classical bottlenecks in real-time traffic and supply chain management. ](https://www.pasqal.com/industries/transportation-mobility/)
## Everyday’s brand using tomorrow’s breakthrough
